zh.lifeSummary: Joane De Vernon是Richard De Vernon Sir和Joanna verch Rhys Heiress of STACKPOLE的女兒，出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾貝斯可特。她於大約1430年與Sir Baldwin Mountfort在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾貝斯可特結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1432年在英國史洛普爾盧德洛福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Joane De Vernon是Richard De Vernon Sir和Joanna verch Rhys Heiress of STACKPOLE的女儿，出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾貝斯可特。她于大约1430年与Sir Baldwin Mountfort在英国英格兰斯塔福爾貝斯可特结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1432年在英国史洛普爾盧德洛福。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vernon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Vernon in Eure, France, named from the Gaulish element ver(n) ‘alder’ + the Gallo-Roman locative suffix -o (genitive -ōnis).
French: habitational name from the same place as in 1 above or from any of several other places in France with the same name and etymology.

variants.name: Varnon
meanings: English (Leicestershire and Northamptonshire): variant of   Vernon  .

nameMeanings.name: Joane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

variants.name: Johanne
meanings: and Norwegian feminine form of   Johan .

variants.name: Joann
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Joane De Vernon was born in Bescot, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Richard De Vernon Sir and Joanna verch Rhys Heiress of STACKPOLE. She married Sir Baldwin Mountfort about 1430, in Bescot, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1432, in Ludlow, Shropshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Joane De Vernon est née à Bescot, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de Richard De Vernon Sir et Joanna verch Rhys Heiress of STACKPOLE. Elle a épousé Sir Baldwin Mountfort environ 1430, à Bescot, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1432, à Ludlow, Shropshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Joane De Vernon wurde in Bescot, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Richard De Vernon Sir und Joanna verch Rhys Heiress of STACKPOLE geboren. Sie hat um 1430 in Bescot, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Baldwin Mountfort geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1432 in Ludlow, Shropshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Joane De Vernon è nata il nel Bescot, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlia di Richard De Vernon Sir e Joanna verch Rhys Heiress of STACKPOLE. Lei sposato Sir Baldwin Mountfort circa 1430, nel Bescot, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1432, nel Ludlow, Shropshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joane De VernonはイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアベスコトでRichard De Vernon SirとJoanna verch Rhys Heiress of STACKPOLEの娘として生まれた。約1430年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアベスコトでSir Baldwin Mountfortと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1432年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアルドロウで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joane De Vernon(은)는 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 베스컷에서 Richard De Vernon Sir(와)과 Joanna verch Rhys Heiress of STACKPOLE의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1430년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 베스컷에서 Sir Baldwin Mountfort(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1432년 영국 슈럽실르 루들로에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Joane De Vernon nasceu em Bescot, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filha de Richard De Vernon Sir e Joanna verch Rhys Heiress of STACKPOLE. Ela casou-se com Sir Baldwin Mountfort aproximadamente 1430, em Bescot, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1432, em Ludlow, Shropshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Joane De Vernon родилась в местности бескот, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. Её родителей звали Richard De Vernon Sir и Joanna verch Rhys Heiress of STACKPOLE. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Baldwin Mountfort около 1430 г. в местности бескот, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1432 г. в местности лудлоу, шропшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Joane De Vernon nació en Bescot, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hija de Richard De Vernon Sir y Joanna verch Rhys Heiress of STACKPOLE. Se casó con Sir Baldwin Mountfort aproximadamente 1430, en Bescot, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1432, en Ludlow, Shropshire, Inglaterra.
